title: QR uuid polling loop busy-waits with no backoff
body: login() does `while not self.get_QRuuid(): time.sleep(1)` -- if WeChat's endpoint is slow or rate-limiting us, this just retries every second forever with no exponential backoff or max-attempts, and logs 'Getting uuid of QR code.' every iteration flooding the console.

title: httplib fallback import breaks on Python 3.10+
body: login.py does `try: from httplib import BadStatusLine except ImportError: from http.client import BadStatusLine`, but on some Python 3.10+ builds the bare `import httplib` line itself raises ModuleNotFoundError in a way that isn't being caught cleanly, causing an ImportError at module load instead of falling back.

title: Hot-reload file path isn't configurable
body: core.py hardcodes `self.hotReloadDir = 'itchat.pkl'` relative to the current working directory. When running multiple bots from different working directories they collide or fail to find their pickle file. Can this be passed as a parameter to login() or hotReload setup instead of always being the cwd-relative default?

title: Message template / content type mapping is undocumented
body: storage/templates.py wraps raw message dicts and content.py defines the message type constants, but I can't find anywhere that maps, say, MSGTYPE 47 to 'this is an emoji share' in plain language. A short reference table would save a lot of trial and error.
